steps.data:
<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Amazon Pet Days Deals
 * Description: Remote Data Blocks integration for Amazon Pet Days Deals with per-category filtering.
 * Version: 1.0.0
 */

function register_amazon_pet_days_deals_blocks() {
    $output_schema = [
        'is_collection' => true,
        'type' => [
            'id'          => [ 'name' => 'ID',          'path' => '$.id',          'type' => 'id'         ],
            'name'        => [ 'name' => 'Name',        'path' => '$.name',        'type' => 'string'     ],
            'description' => [ 'name' => 'Description', 'path' => '$.description', 'type' => 'string'     ],
            'category'    => [ 'name' => 'Category',    'path' => '$.category',    'type' => 'string'     ],
            'brand'       => [ 'name' => 'Brand',       'path' => '$.brand',       'type' => 'string'     ],
            'discount'    => [ 'name' => 'Discount',    'path' => '$.discount',    'type' => 'string'     ],
            'url'         => [ 'name' => 'URL',         'path' => '$.url',         'type' => 'button_url' ],
        ],
    ];

    register_remote_data_block([
        'title'        => 'Amazon Pet Days Deals — All',
        'render_query' => [
            'query' => [
                'display_name'  => 'Get All Pet Days Deals',
                'data_source'   => [ 'display_name' => 'Amazon Pet Days Deals API', 'endpoint' => 'https://elbyrd09.github.io/commerce-claude-vip/demos/nbc-shopping-pets/data.json' ],
                'output_schema' => $output_schema,
            ],
        ],
    ]);

    register_remote_data_block([
        'title'        => 'Amazon Pet Days Deals — Dog Products',
        'render_query' => [
            'query' => [
                'display_name'  => 'Get Dog Products',
                'data_source'   => [ 'display_name' => 'Amazon Pet Days Deals API', 'endpoint' => 'https://elbyrd09.github.io/commerce-claude-vip/demos/nbc-shopping-pets/data-dog-products.json' ],
                'output_schema' => $output_schema,
            ],
        ],
    ]);

    register_remote_data_block([
        'title'        => 'Amazon Pet Days Deals — Cat Products',
        'render_query' => [
            'query' => [
                'display_name'  => 'Get Cat Products',
                'data_source'   => [ 'display_name' => 'Amazon Pet Days Deals API', 'endpoint' => 'https://elbyrd09.github.io/commerce-claude-vip/demos/nbc-shopping-pets/data-cat-products.json' ],
                'output_schema' => $output_schema,
            ],
        ],
    ]);

    register_remote_data_block([
        'title'        => 'Amazon Pet Days Deals — Pet Food',
        'render_query' => [
            'query' => [
                'display_name'  => 'Get Pet Food',
                'data_source'   => [ 'display_name' => 'Amazon Pet Days Deals API', 'endpoint' => 'https://elbyrd09.github.io/commerce-claude-vip/demos/nbc-shopping-pets/data-pet-food.json' ],
                'output_schema' => $output_schema,
            ],
        ],
    ]);

    register_remote_data_block([
        'title'        => 'Amazon Pet Days Deals — Pet Beds & Furniture',
        'render_query' => [
            'query' => [
                'display_name'  => 'Get Pet Beds and Furniture',
                'data_source'   => [ 'display_name' => 'Amazon Pet Days Deals API', 'endpoint' => 'https://elbyrd09.github.io/commerce-claude-vip/demos/nbc-shopping-pets/data-pet-beds-furniture.json' ],
                'output_schema' => $output_schema,
            ],
        ],
    ]);

    register_remote_data_block([
        'title'        => 'Amazon Pet Days Deals — Pet Health & Grooming',
        'render_query' => [
            'query' => [
                'display_name'  => 'Get Pet Health and Grooming',
                'data_source'   => [ 'display_name' => 'Amazon Pet Days Deals API', 'endpoint' => 'https://elbyrd09.github.io/commerce-claude-vip/demos/nbc-shopping-pets/data-pet-health-grooming.json' ],
                'output_schema' => $output_schema,
            ],
        ],
    ]);
}
add_action( 'init', 'register_amazon_pet_days_deals_blocks', 10, 0 );
